artifact_timing: produced from the latest completed daylight window and recent overnight/runtime evidence

nature.summary: The Thai basil tray remains in a vegetative fill-in phase, with slightly better canopy fill in parts of the tray, persistent uneven vigor, mild stretch, and mixed leaf posture.
notable_events: The latest daytime comparison suggests slight canopy fill improvement over one day rather than a major shift.
No obvious chewing, spotting, mildew, or other clear pest or disease signal is visible in the latest daytime image.

plamp.summary: Picture cadence remains intact, the overnight off-state still looks correct, the daytime light signal remains under-bright/ambiguous, and a fresh Pico disconnect occurred on 2026-05-07.

The latest completed daytime check at 2026-05-07 13:00 HST measured brightness_mean 80.599, still well below the older clear-on range around 109 to 112.
